ops.title: Phase 5 handoff: plan-trip.js graph walker + routing enforcement (v2, C2-C3)
ops.body:
# Phase 5 handoff — plan-trip.js reference graph walker (C2-C3), 2026-07-14

Rewritten: skills/getaway/plan-trip.js (510 → ~560 lines, clean cutover), tests/workflow/plan-trip.test.mjs (31 tests), tests/workflow/harness.mjs (surgical). New: skills/getaway/references/workflows.md (thin walker contract, slop-cop-triaged). `node --test tests/workflow` 31/31 green; `uv run --project cli pytest -q` 506 green untouched; live `trip compile`/`explain` verified against a scratch GETAWAY_HOME round-trip+lodging+hybrid trip and a one-way trip.

## Architecture
- **Load**: one sonnet-low agent runs `trip explain <slug>` + `trip show <slug>`, returns the graph verbatim + judgment.factors keys. The graph is the entire world-model; slug mismatch throws.
- **Validation sweep (pre-dispatch)**: every node's routing checked (model must be sonnet|haiku|opus — anything else, fable included, throws "fable never runs one"); every command/steps argv guarded token-by-token (`^[A-Za-z0-9:._-]+$`, argv[0]==="getaway") because the graph arrives through an agent and is tainted at the walker boundary; agent-shaped node kinds outside {assess, stays} and requires outside {rooms_session} return early as `{status:"shape_surprise", finding, options[2-4]}` with nothing dispatched.
- **Preflight**: graph.requires non-empty → sonnet-low agent opens rooms.aero in `agent-browser --session rooms`, returns {loggedIn, pro}; anything but true/true throws before any node dispatch.
- **Dispatch**: Kahn levels over inputs/outputs artifact edges (inputs without an in-graph producer count satisfied; cycle throws). Per level: fresh nodes skip (unless refresh), runnables fan out via pipeline, judgment nodes run sequentially after.
- **State trust**: after every round a sonnet-low `trip status` re-read is ground truth; unstamped nodes retry exactly once (`retry:<id>` labels), then `failed{node unstamped after one retry}`. Null and prose results funnel into the same path (pipeline/parallel resolve failures to null; a non-object or shape-failing result is treated as null). Quota stop = exit_code 1 on a quota_cost>0 node → `not_run{quota_floor}`, no retry, walk continues over the partial artifact (sweeps fold floor stops into search_states and still stamp; only `expand run` exits 1 unstamped).
- **Flags**: walker appends only `--quota-floor N` (quota-costed nodes) and `--refresh` (sweep kind, when args.refresh).

## Routing enforcement (C2)
Emitted `node.routing` lands on every agent() as {model, effort}; walker bookkeeping (load, status, preflight, stays:intervals, ingest-empty) pins {model:"sonnet", effort:"low"}. `args.researchLane: "opus"(default)|"terra"` — terra routes assess/evidence/stays:walk by `agentType: "codex:codex-wrapper"` with no model opt. Tests assert the full matrix including the terra lane and the fable rejection.

## Judgment contracts as wired
- **Evidence**: COLLECTOR_OF = {seat_quality:verify, cash_anomaly:cash, destination_context:context, transit_risk:transit} (return entry deleted; EVIDENCE_COLLECTORS in constants.py is now consumed by nothing CLI-side). Collectors run in parallel inside the assess node's first dispatch, each writes its own `evidence-<c>.json` via `trip artifact write` and returns {ok,count}; no checkpoint (no node id exists for them — phase_done would reject). Failed-twice collectors drop from the assess reads and surface in result.evidence_failed.
- **Assess**: one research agent reads trip show/prefs show/expand.json/evidence-*.json, told: typed award|cash legs (cash = elapsed+cost only, absence is neutral), weigh CLI-computed fit_facts + preference_misses (never recompute, never gate), per-leg verdicts promote|neutral|demote with evidence, ≤2 notable_stretches with the miss named in why (rank filters to beyond-cut), writes assess.json + `trip phase-done <slug> assess`, returns {ok, journeys, notable_stretches}. Retry re-dispatches synthesis only (collectors run once).
- **Stays**: sonnet-low intervals runner returns {inputs_fp, journeys}; walker guards fp (64-hex), IATA, dates, nights 1..5, journey ids, dedupes disposition:"walk" by search_key (entry duplicated verbatim under every journey id), deferred entries never enter the walk or the prompt. One opus-xhigh browser agent walks sequentially per the recon drive protocol (geocode → deep link start=end=check_in → revalidation poll ~30s → page-context POST /feapi/search, DOM fallback; failure branches incl. logged_out = stop walking, never re-attach) and pipes ONE {"stays":{...}} doc to `stays ingest <slug> --inputs-fp <fp>` (which stamps). All-deferred worklist → ingest-empty agent pipes {"stays": {}} so the node stamps and finalize threads deferrals.

## Deleted from v1
CONTEXT/STATUS/SWEEP/SHORTLIST/ONWARD/BRIDGE/EXPAND/VERIFY/CASH/CONTEXT_EV/TRANSIT/RETURN/RANK/FINALIZE persist-era schemas; the LABEL/FACTOR/AVAIL_ID/CABIN guard consts (values now ride CLI-emitted argv; ABS_PATH/SLUG kept for args, IATA/DATE repurposed for stays splices, CMD_TOKEN/JOURNEY_ID/INPUTS_FP new); COLLECTOR_OF's return_viability entry; foldQuota/quotaRemaining/quotaLow (quota lives at the client boundary now); persist() (CLI self-stamps; judgment agents write+stamp their own); all hardcoded phase sequencing and the stale() closure; the expand agent's quality-classify step (deterministic `expand run` composes; the verify collector owns product research).

## Harness changes
Schema-required enforcement now applies to object payloads only (production schema-forcing observably lets prose strings and nulls through — the garbage/null arms depend on it); pipeline()/parallel() resolve per-item rejections to null, mirroring the production contract. `runWorkflow(args, script, path)` unchanged — the path param tests any conforming script.

## Test inventory (31)
Variant happy paths ×4 (one-way command-verbatim+ordering, round-trip return-after-shortlist, round-trip+lodging preflight/stays/finalize ordering, open-jaw identical mechanics); args adapter ×2 (stringified end-to-end, malformed throws with raw value); preflight ×2 (non-Pro fails loudly before dispatch, unknown requires returns early); shape surprise ×1 (unknown kind, nothing dispatched); quota floor ×1 (not_run, no retry, no fake warnings, walk continues); garbage ×1 (prose → one retry → failed, never silent); null ×2 (scripted null + thrown-agent null via harness settle); routing ×3 (opus/sonnet matrix, terra agentType lane, fable rejected); freshness ×3 (all-fresh skips, refresh reaches only sweeps, mid-run stale downstream runs despite fresh Load snapshot); evidence ×3 (factor→collector mapping incl. return gone, zero-factor, collector failed-twice dropped+reported); assess contract prompt ×1; stays ×5 (walk-only+dedupe+deferred untouched, all-deferred empty ingest, clamp disclosure, unsafe IATA rejected, unsafe fp rejected); guards ×2 (unsafe command token, wrong-slug graph); injection allowlist sweep ×1.

## Phase 8 doc deltas (SKILL.md is NOT mine — the docs phase owns these)
- SKILL.md:57 orchestration rung 3: the CLI is the toolbox; `trip compile`/`explain` emit the graph; plan-trip.js is the codified reference walker (well-fought, not mandatory); non-canonical asks author a walker per references/workflows.md.
- SKILL.md needs the C2 routing table statement (runners sonnet low, single-fact haiku, research opus xhigh / terra via codex-wrapper agentType; fable never runs a trip-planning subagent).
- SKILL.md flow: lodging/session step — when `plan.lodging` is in scope, seed the `rooms` agent-browser session (Touch ID at main level) BEFORE dispatch; the walker preflights and fails loudly without it. Workflow args gain optional `researchLane`.
- SKILL.md:106 "A round trip takes a second Workflow dispatch" dies (one dispatch, in-run returns); step 7's args example unchanged in shape; step 8 unchanged (`trip artifact read <slug> finalists.json`).
- SKILL.md:33-34 CLI map rows: `sweep run <slug> <key>` keys are now `outbound:<label>`/`return`; `shortlist run <slug> --leg outbound|return [--gateway]`; add `trip compile/explain`, `expand run`/`expand detail`, `bridge`, `stays intervals/ingest`.
- SKILL.md:67 quota paragraph: floor enforcement moved into the client (`--quota-floor`, exit-1 semantics); "trust the minimum quota_remaining agents reported" prose is stale — the CLI reconciles headers itself.
- references/workflows.md is written (thin contract); doctrine.md's "the workflow" singular rulings and the second-invocation prose are Phase 8's supersedes.
ops.when: Implementing getaway v2 Phase 8 (docs sweep — SKILL.md deltas listed at the end), Phase 9 (reviewing the walker diff), or any later change to plan-trip.js, references/workflows.md, or tests/workflow/ — this is the walker architecture, its dispatch contracts, and what was deleted from v1.
